hero.badge_2: FSPA Service Pro of the Year
hero.headline: Sarasota's Most Trusted Pool Care Team
hero.subheadline: For over 22 years, we have kept Sarasota pools crystal clear so families can enjoy their backyard without the guesswork. Award-winning service, licensed contractors, and a 4.9-star reputation you can count on.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Weekly Visits to Full Renovations
services.subtitle: Whether your pool needs a weekly tune-up or a complete transformation, our licensed team handles it all so you can spend time swimming instead of scrubbing.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Skimming, brushing, vacuuming, filter cleaning, and precise chemical balancing every week. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Install
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and automation diagnosed and repaired fast. Most issues resolved in a single visit by our licensed technicians.

cards.title: Green to Clean Recovery
cards.description: Algae-filled, neglected, or cloudy pool? Our specialized deep-clean process restores even the worst pools back to crystal-clear condition.

cards.title: Pool Automation
cards.description: Control your pump, heater, lights, and more from your smartphone. We install and configure smart pool systems for effortless convenience.

cards.title: Pool Renovation
cards.description: Resurfacing, custom tile, new pavers, coping replacement, and modern equipment upgrades. We transform aging pools into backyard showpieces.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing that keeps water safe, sparkling, and gentle on skin. No guesswork, no red eyes, just perfectly balanced water every time.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We will visit your pool, assess its condition, and provide an honest quote within 24 hours. No pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our licensed, background-checked technicians arrive on time, every time. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and water testing are all handled for you.

steps.title: Dive Into Your Clear Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all year. If anything is ever off, we come back and fix it at no extra charge. That is our On-Time promise.

about.label: Why Sarasota Trusts Us
about.headline: 22 Years of Award-Winning Pool Care in Your Backyard
about.description: Since 2004, On-Time Pool Service has been the name Sarasota families rely on for pool care done right. As a state-licensed contractor with an A+ BBB rating and the FSPA Service Professional of the Year award, we bring a level of expertise and accountability that most companies cannot match. Our team treats every pool like it is their own, backed by 532 five-star reviews and a reputation built one satisfied customer at a time.

features.title: Licensed & Award-Winning
features.description: State-licensed pool contractor, FSPA Service Professional of the Year, and three-time Herald Tribune Readers' Choice winner.

features.title: Always On Time, Every Time
features.description: Our name is our promise. We show up when we say we will, communicate proactively, and never leave you guessing.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a visit? We come back and make it right at no charge. Over 22 years, that commitment has earned us 532+ five-star reviews.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime with zero hassle.

guarantee.headline: Our "On-Time Perfect Pool" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back to make it right at absolutely no cost. We have built our reputation on doing what we say, when we say it. If the job is not done to your standards, we are not done.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer priority same-day or next-day response. Just call us at 941-224-0404 and we will get you taken care of fast.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. On-Time Pool Service is a state-licensed pool contractor (CPC#1459543) and LP Gas installer. Every technician is background-checked, fully insured, and trained to our award-winning standards.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home when you come?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. You will receive a service summary after each visit so you always know what was done and the status of your pool.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve around Sarasota?
faqs.answer: We serve Sarasota, Lakewood Ranch, Siesta Key, Bird Key, Casey Key, Longboat Key, Bradenton, Venice, Palmer Ranch, Nokomis, University Park, and surrounding Gulf Coast communities.

faqs.question: Can you fix my pool equipment or do I need a separate company?
faqs.answer: We handle it all in-house. As a licensed contractor, we diagnose and repair pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, automation, and more. Most repairs are completed the same visit, saving you time and money.

testimonials.name: Cheryl S.
testimonials.text: Ontime pool is just what it says, always on time. And excellent work. They have maintained our pool for years and it always looks perfect. Highly recommend them to anyone in Sarasota.

testimonials.name: Vincent L.
testimonials.text: Very satisfied with your service, my pool looks fabulous. The team is knowledgeable, friendly, and always willing to answer questions. We would not trust anyone else with our pool.

testimonials.name: Peter & Gary R.
testimonials.text: They are reliable and efficient and keep the pool looking and working well. After trying several other services over the years, On-Time is the only one that has lived up to their name.
